svg.title: Claims assessment interview automation flow using LangChain
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the end-to-end pipeline from claimant input through LangChain agents to final decision output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the claimant initiate a claim interview?')
sendPrompt('What does the intake agent do in LangChain?')
sendPrompt('How is conversation memory managed in LangChain claims bot?')
sendPrompt('How does the dynamic questioning agent work?')
sendPrompt('What triggers a follow-up question vs moving to the next stage?')
sendPrompt('How does LangChain extract data from uploaded claim documents?')
sendPrompt('How does the fraud detection tool work in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the coverage evaluation agent use policy rules?')
sendPrompt('What are the possible outcomes of the claims assessment decision?')
sendPrompt('What does the final claims report look like?')
